calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION BOARD'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION (FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS AND DAMAGES).

APPEARANCES: Michael J. Robinson, 215-2490 petitioner & opposing party in propria persona; no other appearances.

RULING: Petitioner did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing. Court finds petitioner's opposition filed on 10/25/10 as untimely. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO NAME THE REAL PARTY IN INTEREST WITHIN THE PRESCRIBED TIME LIMIT. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
